text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day Maruzensky and I finally begin
training for her debut race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or that was our plan, at least...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky, is it true that preparations for your
debut race are in full swing?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You've already been given the nickname "Hot
Rod." Are you confident you can back up such a
title?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well... I appreciate all of the attention, but
I'd like to focus on training for now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to keep my trainer waiting, so I'll
have to end the interview here. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to keep my trainer waiting, so I'll
have to end the interview here. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Aw, can't you tell us anything more?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Charlie! You'll just have to wait!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Well, this Twinkle Series sure is shaping up to be very interesting!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: It sure is! But... who's "Charlie"?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... Those reporters came out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fact that they're so interested in Maruzensky
before she's even debuted shows how high
expectations are of her.
choice_data_list: They're expecting big things from you.
They're expecting big things from you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then I'd better try my best to meet those
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All righty then, let's start with a 1,200-meter run
to see where I stand for my debut race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm so hyped up today, I think I might set a new
record for myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The talent is clearly there, but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The wind feels so good... Okay, I'm going to shift
into higher gear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Above all else, the most charming thing about her
is just how much she enjoys running!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, time really does fly when you're having a
blast.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer, shall we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer, shall we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Great running, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You looked super cool out there today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my gosh! Thanks, you guys! I'm so happy you
think I'm cool!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um... Could we maybe... practice together
sometime? I wanna run super fast, like you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to win in the Classics! With your
help, I'm sure I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
And I want to win the Arima Kinen! So please run
with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How could I say no to such cute little athletes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Absitively posolutely! Let's all run together next time!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much! See you then! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! But what does "absitively posolutely"
mean?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! To be young is a great thing.
choice_data_list: The newer students really look up to you.
The newer students really look up to you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And I'm so grateful. Their support pushes me to
work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And yet... they have such big dreams about the
Classics and the Grand Prix.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Do you think I should aim for something like
that too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be talking about the need to set clear
goals for herself...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aim high?
choice_data_list:
It would be fun to run in the biggest races,
don't you think?

It would be fun to run in the biggest races,
don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Fun?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You really are something else, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You really are something else, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Most people would talk about winning, but you focus on how fun the races will be. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you've convinced me! After my debut, let's
aim for the big ones!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okey dokey, artichokey!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we have something sweet to
commemorate our new beginning?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know all the hip places! It'll be my treat!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Doesn't it look delicious? This stuff is
mega huge with trendy people, you know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yum, orange smoothie! Enjoy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's just starting to catch on, so there aren't many
stores that serve it!
choice_data_list: Couldn't that mean it's just... not popular?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're so behind the times, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're so behind the times, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I always follow the latest happenings, so I know
what's hot and what's not!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, c'mon, drink up! It's a new flavor sensation
that'll make you weep with joy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Maruzensky, with her brilliant racing
instincts—and questionable trend
knowledge—begins her next challenge!
